zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bacon於1427年出生在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普時，他的父親John Walker Bacon26歲，母親Margaret Baynard23歲。他於大約1446年與Margery Jenny在英國素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bacon于1427年出生在英国諾福爾可巴根斯索普时，他的父亲John Walker Bacon26岁，母亲Margaret Baynard23岁。他于大约1446年与Margery Jenny在英国素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bacon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Norman French personal name Bacun, derived from the ancient Germanic name Bac(c)o, Bahho, based on the element bag ‘(to) fight, (to) dispute’. The name was relatively common among the Normans in the form Bacus, of which the oblique case was Bacon.

English and French: from Middle English, Old French bacun, bacon ‘bacon’ (a word of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Back 3), probably a metonymic occupational name for a preparer and seller of cured pork.

History: Gilles Bacon from Normandy, France, is documented in Quebec City, QC, in 1647. — Michael Bacon from England arrived in Dedham, MA, in 1640. Nathanial Bacon, from Stratton, Cornwall, arrived in Barnstaple, MA, in 1639. Another Nathaniel Bacon (1647–76), from Friston Hall, Suffolk, emigrated to VA and settled at Curl's Neck on the James river.

variants.name: Bagg
meanings: from Middle English bagge ‘bag, pack, bundle’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of bags and sacks of various kinds, including wallets and purses. It might also have been used for a beggar, or for one who carried their belongings in a bag.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Bago (Bac(c)o, Bahho), from the root bag- ‘to fight’ (see Bacon 2).

variants.name: Back
meanings: English (Devon, Kent, Sussex, and Norfolk): from the Middle English personal name Bakke (Old English Bacca). It is of uncertain origin, but may have been a byname in the same sense as 3.
English: nickname from Middle English bakke ‘bat’, of uncertain application, perhaps a nickname for a person with poor eyesight, from the expression ‘blind as a bat’.

English: from Middle English bakke ‘back’ (Old English bæc), hence a nickname for someone with a hunched back or some other noticeable peculiarity of the back or spine, or a topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or ridge, or at the rear of a settlement.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bacon was born in 1427, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, John Walker Bacon, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Baynard, was 23. He married Margery Jenny about 1446, in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died in 1485, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bacon est né en 1427, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Walker Bacon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Baynard, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery Jenny environ 1446, à Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1485, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bacon 1427 in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Walker Bacon 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Baynard 23. Er hat um 1446 in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England Margery Jenny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1485 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bacon è nato il nel 1427 nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Walker Bacon, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Baynard, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margery Jenny circa 1446, nel Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1485, nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Baconが1427年にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペで生まれた時，父John Walker Baconは26歳，母Margaret Baynardは23歳であった。約1446年にイギリススフォルクノディシャル ウィス ブクスロウでMargery Jennyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bacon(이)가 1427년 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Walker Bacon(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Baynard(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1446년 영국 수폴크 노디샤 위스 버스로에서 Margery Jenny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bacon nasceu em 1427, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Walker Bacon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Baynard, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Jenny aproximadamente 1446, em Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1485, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bacon родился в 1427 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Walker Bacon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Baynard, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Jenny около 1446 г. в местности нодишолл вит букслоу, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1485 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Margery Jenny aproximadamente 1446, en Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió en 1485, en Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
